preToolUse.bash: if [ -f ./hooks/communication-guard.sh ]; then bash ./hooks/communication-guard.sh preToolUse; elif [ -f ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/communication-guard.sh ]; then bash ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/communication-guard.sh preToolUse; else exit 0; fi

sessionStart.bash: if [ -f ./hooks/session-trace.sh ]; then bash ./hooks/session-trace.sh sessionStart; elif [ -f ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/session-trace.sh ]; then bash ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/session-trace.sh sessionStart; else exit 0; fi

sessionEnd.bash: if [ -f ./hooks/session-trace.sh ]; then bash ./hooks/session-trace.sh sessionEnd; elif [ -f ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/session-trace.sh ]; then bash ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/session-trace.sh sessionEnd; else exit 0; fi

subagentStart.bash: if [ -f ./hooks/session-trace.sh ]; then bash ./hooks/session-trace.sh subagentStart; elif [ -f ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/session-trace.sh ]; then bash ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/session-trace.sh subagentStart; else exit 0; fi

if [ -f ./hooks/communication-guard.sh ]; then bash ./hooks/communication-guard.sh subagentStart; elif [ -f ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/communication-guard.sh ]; then bash ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/communication-guard.sh subagentStart; else exit 0; fi

subagentStop.bash: if [ -f ./hooks/session-trace.sh ]; then bash ./hooks/session-trace.sh subagentStop; elif [ -f ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/session-trace.sh ]; then bash ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/session-trace.sh subagentStop; else exit 0; fi

if [ -f ./hooks/communication-guard.sh ]; then bash ./hooks/communication-guard.sh subagentStop; elif [ -f ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/communication-guard.sh ]; then bash ./plugins/mission-control/hooks/communication-guard.sh subagentStop; else exit 0; fi
